---
title: "Water Quality Report"
format: 
  pdf:
    classoption: landscape
params:
  df_report: NA
  year: NA
---


```{r}
#| label: tbl-report
#| tbl-cap: !expr paste0("Water Quality (", params$year, ")")
#| echo: false

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Drop extra rows
dat <- data.frame(params$df_report, check.names = FALSE)

col_count <- ncol(dat)
row_count <- nrow(dat)

# Create kable
knitr::kable(
  dat, "latex",
  longtable = T,
  booktabs = T,
  caption = paste0("Report Card (", params$year, ")")
) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("repeat_header", "striped")
  ) |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(1:col_count, width = "7em") |>
  kableExtra::row_spec(0, bold = T, background = "#EEEEEE")
```
